name: Canon Hydrothermal
description: Affût de bombardement monté sur un châssis de crabe. Son canon-geyser concentre la pression des fonds marins en un jet de plasma surchauffé capable de traverser un blockhaus. Long temps de recharge, impact cataclysmique.
prompt: Alien artillery crab vehicle with enormous geyser cannon barrel, cracked focusing lenses glowing orange-white, copper cooling coils wrapped around barrel, steam erupting from pressure valves, rust-orange armored chassis on crab legs, plasma charge building at muzzle, dark battlefield, halogen targeting lights
